title: Prepare REL-v0.6.0 publication
steps: Instantiate the release templates without copying a previous release instance.
Run the sanctioned candidate and pre-tag commands from the release runbook.
Record only observed evidence and hand off tag creation to the user.

results.summary: REL-v0.6.0 passed candidate, current-main pre-tag, tag, hosted publication, and finalization evidence collection without moving or recreating the immutable tag.
tests_run: PR #8 Governance, Ubuntu quick, and Package Candidate jobs passed
local tag-phase validation passed for annotated tag v0.6.0
hosted publication validation passed with one stable Release and four governed assets
results.residual_risk: The next roadmap target remains intentionally unassigned pending owner discussion; v0.7.0 remains conditional.
